posts.title: How Databricks’ FlashOptim cuts LLM training memory by 50 percent
posts.summary: Training large language models usually requires a cluster of GPUs. FlashOptim changes the math, enabling full-parameter training on fewer accelerators. The post How Databricks’ FlashOptim cuts LLM training memory by 50 percent first appeared on TechTalks .
posts.author: Ben Dickson
